name: Aloha Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the pasta and set aside.
2. Steam the peas and broccoli together until tender, about 4 minutes. Allow vegetables to cool.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the pasta, broccoli, peas, pineapple, onion, and celery.
4. In a small bowl, combine mustard, red onion, vinegar, and oil.
5. Whisk together to combine.
6. Pour the dressing over the pasta, stirring gently to combine.
7. Serve chilled.
